title: Add a Time Column to MY WORK
excerpt: I would like to be able to see an estimated time for a task on the MY WORK board. I can currently see all the tasks assigned to someone and the dates they are due… but organizing them would be so much easier if I could a…

posts.author: SRodriquez (Sheila Rodriquez)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to see an estimated time for a task on the MY WORK board. I can currently see all the tasks assigned to someone and the dates they are due… but organizing them would be so much easier if I could also pull in the time estimated column which already exists on the boards. Without this, the MY WORK feature is useless. I’ve seen many posts on this same topic going back many years. The ability to add in and customize a column seems like a general concern. Entering a new thread to bring it to the top.
